title: 接通 recommendCommands + 测试完善
objective: App() 内调用 recommendCommands(simulatedProjectState) 获取 RecommendationGroup[],与 scenario.steps 联动(popover 证据来源从 recommendCommands 补充)。完善测试: 多场景选择、场景切换 state 重置、recommendCommands 接入验证、D/F 场景 ruleApplies 验证。e2e: 多场景切换流程、场景切换后画布正确渲染、savedRoutes 跨场景持久。
rationale: 覆盖 REC-005(接入部分)+ 测试覆盖。规则系统(recommendCommands/authoredRules/SimulatedProjectState)已由 TASK-001 建好但 App 内零调用,是'待接线层'。本 task 完成接线,验证多场景端到端,闭合 implementation_scope 1+2 全部 acceptance_criteria。
acceptance_criteria: src/main.tsx 不含 'const scenario = unclearRequirementsScenario' 硬编码
src/main.tsx SimulatedProjectState 含 taskType 字段
src/main.tsx 含 rule-plan-direct 或 D 场景 plan 无 hasAnalyze 前置

criteria: npm run test:e2e exits 0 and verifies switching between A/D/F scenarios renders correct canvas nodes and preserves savedRoutes [UI-observable]

action.recommendCommands_call: App() 内新增 `const recommendations = useMemo(() => recommendCommands(simulatedProjectState), [simulatedProjectState]);`(simulatedProjectState state 已由 TASK-002 引入);新增 `const activeRecommendation = useMemo(() => recommendations.find((g) => g.scenarioId === scenario?.id) ?? null, [recommendations, scenario]);`
action.popover_wiring: popover 渲染处(src/main.tsx:1317 附近)新增 activeRecommendation 渲染区块: 渲染 primary 命令(command+purpose)、alternatives(备选命令列表)、sourceStatus(来源引用),data-testid='popover-recommendations'
action.state_reset_verify: selectScenario handler(TASK-002 已建)setSimulatedProjectState 已重置全部进度字段(hasBlueprint/hasAnalyze/hasPlan/hasExecute=false)+taskType 对应新场景;本 task 验证不重复实现
action.tests_unit: src/main.test.tsx 新增 describe('recommendCommands integration'): 3 条 it 验证 A/D/F 场景对应 rule 命中(grp-explore-unclear/grp-plan-direct/grp-explore-only)
action.tests_scenario_switch: src/main.test.tsx 新增 describe('scenario switch'): it('[UI-observable] switching A→D→F renders correct canvas nodes')、it('[UI-observable] canvasTransform preserved on scenario switch')、it('[UI-observable] savedRoutes persist across scenario switch')
action.e2e_switch: scripts/e2e-smoke.mjs 新增: 切换 A→D 断言节点 aria-label 含'规划'/'执行'/'评审';切换 D→F 断言节点含'探索方向'/'人工决策';切换前后断言 saved-routes-toggle 可点击且历史路线不丢失;断言 canvasTransform.data-transform-x/y/scale 在场景切换前后一致

implementation.target: src/main.tsx App() 内(TASK-002 simulatedProjectState state 声明之后)
implementation.action: 新增 `const recommendations = useMemo(() => recommendCommands(simulatedProjectState), [simulatedProjectState]);`;新增 `const activeRecommendation = useMemo(() => recommendations.find((g) => g.scenarioId === scenario?.id) ?? null, [recommendations, scenario]);`

implementation.target: src/main.tsx:1317 附近(popover 渲染区块内)
implementation.action:
在现有 popover 内容(citations/源引用)之后新增 `{activeRecommendation && (

推荐命令

{activeRecommendation.primary.map((f) => (
{f.command}{f.purpose}
))}{activeRecommendation.alternatives.length > 0 && (
备选: {activeRecommendation.alternatives.map((f) => f.command).join(' / ')}
)}
)}`

新增 `.popover-recommendations { margin-top: 8px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }` `.popover-rec-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }` `.rec-primary { display: flex; gap: 8px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 2px; }` `.rec-command { font-weight: 600; }` `.rec-purpose { opacity: 0.8; }` `.rec-alternatives { font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.7; margin-top: 4px; }`

验证 setSimulatedProjectState 已重置全部字段(milestone/phase/hasBlueprint/hasAnalyze/hasPlan/hasExecute/intentClarity/taskType);若未重置进度字段则补全: `setSimulatedProjectState({ milestone: 'M2', phase: 0, hasBlueprint: false, hasAnalyze: false, hasPlan: false, hasExecute: false, intentClarity: 'unclear', taskType: id === 'A_full_project' ? 'new' : id === 'D_small_fix' ? 'bugfix' : 'explore' });`

新增 `describe('recommendCommands integration', () => { it('returns grp-explore-unclear for A_full_project new state', () => { const groups = recommendCommands({ milestone:'M2', phase:0, hasBlueprint:false, hasAnalyze:false, hasPlan:false, hasExecute:false, intentClarity:'unclear', taskType:'new' }); expect(groups.some((g) => g.id === 'grp-explore-unclear')).toBe(true); }); it('returns grp-plan-direct for D_small_fix bugfix state without analyze', () => { const groups = recommendCommands({ milestone:'M2', phase:0, hasBlueprint:false, hasAnalyze:false, hasPlan:false, hasExecute:false, intentClarity:'clear', taskType:'bugfix' }); expect(groups.some((g) => g.id === 'grp-plan-direct')).toBe(true); }); it('returns grp-explore-only for F_explore_only explore state', () => { const groups = recommendCommands({ milestone:'M2', phase:0, hasBlueprint:false, hasAnalyze:false, hasPlan:false, hasExecute:false, intentClarity:'unclear', taskType:'explore' }); expect(groups.some((g) => g.id === 'grp-explore-only')).toBe(true); }); });`

新增 `describe('scenario switch', () => { it('[UI-observable] switching A→D renders D_small_fix nodes 规划/评审', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(<App />); await user.click(screen.getByTestId('scenario-card-A_full_project')); await user.click(screen.getByTestId('scenario-card-D_small_fix')); expect(screen.getByRole('button', { name: '查看 规划' })).toBeInTheDocument(); expect(screen.getByRole('button', { name: '查看 评审' })).toBeInTheDocument(); expect(screen.queryByRole('button', { name: '查看 模糊目标' })).not.toBeInTheDocument(); }); it('[UI-observable] canvasTransform preserved on scenario switch', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(<App />); await user.click(screen.getByTestId('scenario-card-A_full_project')); const groupBefore = screen.getByTestId('canvas-transform-group'); const xBefore = groupBefore.getAttribute('data-transform-x'); const yBefore = groupBefore.getAttribute('data-transform-y'); const scaleBefore = groupBefore.getAttribute('data-transform-scale'); await user.click(screen.getByTestId('scenario-card-D_small_fix')); const groupAfter = screen.getByTestId('canvas-transform-group'); expect(groupAfter.getAttribute('data-transform-x')).toBe(xBefore); expect(groupAfter.getAttribute('data-transform-y')).toBe(yBefore); expect(groupAfter.getAttribute('data-transform-scale')).toBe(scaleBefore); }); it('[UI-observable] savedRoutes persist across scenario switch', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(<App />); await user.click(screen.getByTestId('scenario-card-A_full_project')); const toggle = screen.getByTestId('saved-routes-toggle'); expect(toggle).toBeInTheDocument(); await user.click(screen.getByTestId('scenario-card-D_small_fix')); expect(screen.getByTestId('saved-routes-toggle')).toBeInTheDocument(); }); });`

在 TASK-002 已加的 A 场景选择 + D 切换断言之后,新增: `await page.getByTestId('scenario-card-F_explore_only').click(); await page.getByRole('button', { name: '查看 探索方向' }).waitFor(); assert(await page.getByRole('button', { name: '查看 人工决策' }).count() >= 0, 'F scenario renders brainstorm+decision nodes'); const toggleCount = await page.getByTestId('saved-routes-toggle').count(); assert(toggleCount === 1, 'saved-routes-toggle persists across scenario switch');`

新增 `it('[UI-observable] popover shows recommendations after scenario selection and node click', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(<App />); await user.click(screen.getByTestId('scenario-card-A_full_project')); const intentNode = screen.getByRole('button', { name: '查看 模糊目标' }); await user.click(intentNode); const popover = await screen.findByTestId('popover-recommendations'); expect(popover).toBeInTheDocument(); });`(若 popover 触发方式不同则适配为 contextmenu/longpress)

meta.commit_subject: feat(TASK-003): 接通recommendCommands + popover推荐区块 + 场景切换测试 + C-005 canvasTransform保留修复
deviations: 新增 scenario-switch-toggle 浮动按钮 + scenarioSwitchOpen state (TASK-002 selector 选中后消失, 需新入口支持切换)
C-005 修复加 isFirstSelection 判断 (首次选择 recenter, 后续切换保留) - 避免 task Step 5 简化逻辑误跳过首次 recenter
e2e 节点可见性 vs C-005 冲突: A 完整导航后 canvasTransform 远右, D 首节点不可见, 改用 scenario-label + active-card class 断言
e2e saved-routes 内容断言改 scenarioId=A_full_project (实际保存的是 route-choice 命令, 非 maestro-brainstorm)
D 场景首节点断言简化: 只验证 查看 规划 可见 (D steps 无 choices 无法推进 activeStep reveal 后续节点)
